hero.subtitle: Building products at the intersection of software and intelligence.

about.label: About me
about.title: Hey, I'm David
about.p1: Spanish developer with experience in full-stack web applications and AI engineering. I specialize in building real products — from mobile apps to LLM pipelines and intelligent agents.
about.p2: What sets me apart is combining both worlds: I can design the architecture, build the frontend and integrate artificial intelligence. I'm looking for a team where I can keep growing in both disciplines.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Let's work together
contact.subtitle: Open to new opportunities and interesting projects. I usually reply within 24h.
